3095320.name: Ergenekon
3095320.description:
An Epic Campaign

Immerse yourself in a mythological narrative in this action-packed single-player FPS. Experience fast-paced gameplay, fluid and enjoyable movement mechanics, and a diverse arsenal of weapons. Explore a world where ancient myths come to life, blending intense action with an engaging storyline. Whether you're dodging through epic battles or mastering powerful myth-inspired weapons, every moment promises thrilling, fast-paced action.
3095320.supported_languages:
英语*, 土耳其语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
